hero.name: Selene Inmaculada García Chacón
hero.title: Web Developer · Video Games · AI
hero.tagline: Building solutions where technology makes sense

about.heading: About Me
about.body: Web Developer specialized in Applied Artificial Intelligence for Business, focused on integrating AI into real-world web projects. I have hands-on experience in frontend and backend development, and I have applied this knowledge in projects such as an intelligent RAG-based assistant deployed in production. I complement my profile with a specialization in Video Games and Virtual Reality, giving me a unique multidisciplinary perspective to tackle problems from different angles.

items.title: Maxmund Intelligent Assistant
items.description: AI-powered customer support system using RAG and specialized agents, with a REST API (JWT), a complete 19-page online store, and Docker deployment on Hugging Face Spaces.

items.title: Deadly Harmony
items.description: Original video game demo featuring gameplay mechanics, dialogue systems, inventory, and object interaction. 2D pixel art digital design.

items.title: Escuela de Arte de Toledo
items.description: Complete institutional website for the art school, including structure, visual design, and custom functionality. Domain management, hosting, and production deployment.

items.title: Heaven Travel — Localization
items.description: Volunteer localization project for an indie game. English to Spanish translation while maintaining narrative and gameplay coherence. Remote collaborative work.

items.title: Creation-Of-Chatbot-AI
items.description: AI chatbot built with Next.js and Firebase Studio. Implements RAG using LlamaIndex and Gemini for contextual document-based responses.

items.title: Dune 2D
items.description: 2D video game based on the Dune universe. Game mechanics, sprites, and gameplay logic development with Unity.

items.title: Graphic-Design
items.description: Collection of 2D and 3D graphic design work, including digital illustration, 3D modeling, and concept design using various creative tools.

contact.heading: Contact
contact.subtitle: Let's Talk!
contact.body: I'm available for professional opportunities, freelance projects, or collaborations. If you're looking for a web developer with a vision in AI, video games, and creative technology, I'd love to chat.
